description: A web application to visualize and analyze Claude Code sessions with CLI tools for parsing session data and a frontend for interactive visualization with detailed statistics and analytics

userStories.title: Project Setup with UV Environment
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Python environment managed by UV so that dependencies are consistent and isolated
acceptanceCriteria: pyproject.toml file created with project metadata
uv.lock file generated for dependency locking
Python dependencies specified (Flask/FastAPI, pydantic, click for CLI)
Development dependencies added (pytest, playwright, black, mypy)
UV environment can be initialized with 'uv sync'
userStories.notes: Initialize new Python project structure. Create pyproject.toml with UV. Set up src/ directory structure for package.

userStories.title: Session Data Parser Schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want type-safe data models for Claude session data so that parsing is reliable and maintainable
acceptanceCriteria: Pydantic models created for Session, Message, ToolCall, Subagent structures
Type hints used throughout all models
userStories.notes: Create src/claudecodesessionvis/models.py. Define SessionMetadata, MessageRecord, ToolCallRecord, SubagentSession, SessionStatistics classes.

userStories.title: Session File Parser CLI
userStories.description: As a user, I want a CLI tool to parse Claude session files so that I can extract structured data from session directories
acceptanceCriteria: Click-based CLI accepts --path argument for custom session directory
Parser reads all session JSON files in directory
Outputs parsed data to stdout or JSON file
userStories.notes: Create src/claudecodesessionvis/cli.py and src/claudecodesessionvis/parser.py. Implement session file discovery and parsing logic.

userStories.title: Session Statistics Calculator
userStories.description: As a user, I want detailed statistics about sessions so that I can understand usage patterns and performance
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate total message count per session
Count tool calls by type (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, etc.)
Track subagent invocations and their types
Identify most used tools and patterns
userStories.notes: Create src/claudecodesessionvis/analytics.py. Implement SessionAnalyzer class with methods for each metric type.

userStories.title: Web Backend API Setup
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want a REST API backend so that the web UI can fetch and display session data
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/sessions endpoint lists all available sessions
API returns proper JSON responses with error handling
Integration with parser and analytics modules
API can accept --path CLI argument on startup
userStories.notes: Create src/claudecodesessionvis/api.py. Set up FastAPI with routes. Create server.py entry point that accepts CLI args.

userStories.title: Frontend Project Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a modern frontend framework setup so that I can build an interactive UI
acceptanceCriteria: React/Vue/Svelte project initialized in frontend/ directory
Tailwind CSS or CSS framework installed
Package.json with dev and build scripts
Development server runs on localhost:5173 or similar
Build output configured to static/ or dist/
userStories.notes: Create frontend/ directory. Initialize with Vite + React + TypeScript. Configure for API integration with backend.

userStories.title: Session Selector Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dropdown to select sessions so that I can switch between different Claude Code sessions
acceptanceCriteria: Dropdown component fetches sessions from API
Supports single-session mode via URL parameter
TypeScript types defined for session data
userStories.notes: Create frontend/src/components/SessionSelector.tsx. Implement state management for selected session.

userStories.title: Message Timeline UI Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want a social-media-style message timeline so that I can read conversations in a familiar format
acceptanceCriteria: Narrow, tall scrollable container with messages
Subagent messages distinguished by color scheme
Auto-scroll to bottom on load option
Responsive design for different screen widths
Code blocks rendered with syntax highlighting
TypeScript component with proper props typing
userStories.notes: Create frontend/src/components/MessageTimeline.tsx. Use react-markdown or similar for rendering. Implement color coding for message sources.

userStories.title: Subagent Session Visualization
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see subagent conversations nested within main sessions so that I understand the agent hierarchy
acceptanceCriteria: Subagent messages clearly nested or indented
Visual indicator (border, background) for subagent context
Subagent type label displayed (Explore, Bash, general-purpose, etc.)
Distinct color palette for subagent levels
TypeScript types for nested subagent structure
userStories.notes: Extend MessageTimeline component. Create SubagentSection.tsx for recursive nesting. Update message rendering logic.

userStories.title: Session Metadata Sidebar
userStories.description: As a user, I want a right sidebar showing session metadata so that I can see session details at a glance
acceptanceCriteria: Fixed sidebar on right side of screen
Displays session ID, creation time, duration
Lists all models used in session
userStories.notes: Create frontend/src/components/SessionSidebar.tsx. Design info card layout with Tailwind CSS.

userStories.title: Statistics Dashboard Panel
userStories.description: As a user, I want detailed statistics visualizations so that I can analyze session performance and usage
acceptanceCriteria: Card-based layout for different stat categories
Token usage by tool type (profiling view)
All data fetched from statistics API endpoint
userStories.notes: Create frontend/src/components/StatisticsPanel.tsx. Integrate charting library. Create StatCard.tsx for individual metrics.

userStories.title: Tool Call Visualization
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see tool calls highlighted in the timeline so that I understand what actions were taken
acceptanceCriteria: Tool calls displayed as special message types
Tool icon/badge shows tool type (Read, Write, Bash, etc.)
Error states for failed tool calls
Token cost shown per tool call if available
TypeScript types for tool call data structure
userStories.notes: Create frontend/src/components/ToolCallMessage.tsx. Update MessageTimeline to handle tool call rendering.

userStories.title: Advanced Analytics Features
userStories.description: As a power user, I want advanced profiling and analytics so that I can optimize my Claude usage
userStories.notes: Create frontend/src/components/AdvancedAnalytics.tsx. Implement data export functionality. Add comparison views.

userStories.title: Responsive Layout Implementation
userStories.description: As a user on any device, I want a responsive layout so that I can view sessions on desktop, tablet, or mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Three-column layout on desktop (selector, timeline, sidebar)
Sidebar converts to collapsible drawer on mobile
Readable font sizes on all devices
No horizontal scrolling on any viewport
userStories.notes: Update frontend/src/App.tsx and all components. Implement responsive CSS with Tailwind breakpoints.

userStories.title: Playwright Visual Testing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want automated screenshot tests so that I can verify UI functionality and aesthetics
acceptanceCriteria: Test script for home page screenshot
Test fixtures with sample session data
userStories.notes: Create tests/e2e/ directory. Write tests/e2e/session_visualization.spec.py with Playwright. Configure pytest-playwright.

userStories.title: CLI Integration Mode
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want the backend to integrate with the CLI parser so that I can run the full stack from one command
acceptanceCriteria: CLI accepts --path for custom session directory
CLI accepts --host and --port for server config
Backend serves frontend static files in production mode
userStories.notes: Update src/claudecodesessionvis/cli.py with 'serve' command. Integrate API startup with CLI arguments.

userStories.title: Error Handling and User Feedback
userStories.description: As a user, I want clear error messages so that I understand what went wrong and how to fix it
acceptanceCriteria: API returns proper HTTP status codes
Empty states for no sessions found
Console errors for debugging in dev mode
userStories.notes: Add error boundary in frontend/src/App.tsx. Create frontend/src/components/ErrorToast.tsx. Improve backend error responses.

userStories.title: Documentation and README
userStories.description: As a new user, I want comprehensive documentation so that I can set up and use the tool easily
userStories.notes: Create comprehensive README.md at project root. Add docs/ directory with detailed guides.

userStories.title: End-to-End Integration Testing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests so that I can ensure all components work together correctly
acceptanceCriteria: Pytest fixtures for test session data
Backend API tests with test client
Parser integration tests with sample files
Full stack test with backend + frontend
userStories.notes: Create tests/ directory with test_api.py, test_parser.py, test_analytics.py. Set up pytest configuration in pyproject.toml.

userStories.title: Performance Optimization
userStories.description: As a user with large sessions, I want fast loading times so that I can work efficiently with big datasets
acceptanceCriteria: Lazy loading for large message lists
Backend response time under 200ms for typical queries
userStories.notes: Implement react-window or react-virtual in MessageTimeline. Add caching layer in backend API. Optimize frontend bundle with Vite.
